parameters.name: Workspaces
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: TagKey
parameters.label: 🏷️ Tag Key
parameters.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines')
| where isnotempty(tags)
| project tagKeys = bag_keys(tags)
| mv-expand tagKey = tagKeys to typeof(string)
| distinct tagKey
| order by tagKey asc
| project value = tagKey, label = tagKey

parameters.name: TagValue
parameters.label: 🏷️ Tag Value
parameters.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines')
| where isnotempty(tags) and isnotempty(tostring(tags['{TagKey}']))
| extend TagVal = tostring(tags['{TagKey}'])
| distinct TagVal
| order by TagVal asc
| project value = TagVal, label = TagVal

parameters.name: TaggedComputers
parameters.label: Tagged Computers
parameters.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines')
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or tostring(tags['{TagKey}']) in ({TagValue})
| extend ArcName = tolower(tostring(name))
| extend OSName  = tolower(tostring(coalesce(properties.osProfile.computerName, properties.computerName, properties.displayName, name)))
| project names = pack_array(ArcName, OSName)
| mv-expand n = names to typeof(string)
| distinct n
| where isnotempty(n)
| order by n asc
| project value = n, label = n

parameters.name: HostMap
parameters.label: Host Map
parameters.query:
let HB = Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize HBComputer = any(Computer) by _ResourceId;
let IM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize MetricComputer = any(Computer) by _ResourceId;
HB
| join kind=inner IM on _ResourceId
| extend ArcName = tolower(tostring(split(HBComputer, '.')[0]))
| extend OSName  = MetricComputer
| where ArcName != tolower(OSName)
| summarize Map = make_bag(pack(ArcName, OSName))
| project Map = tostring(Map)

parameters.name: SelectedVM
parameters.label: VM Filter
parameters.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| order by Computer asc
| project value = tolower(Computer), label = Computer

content.json:
## 🏠 Overview — Fleet Health
Heartbeat-based host status and active threshold alerts.

> 🏷️ **Tag Filter active:** Use the Tag Key / Tag Value pills above to scope this dashboard to VMs matching specific tags.

> 💡 **Hostname normalized (v36):** AWS EC2 instances managed by Arc display their actual OS hostname (e.g. `EC2AMAZ-ON6TNDD`). The mapping is built from Log Analytics (Heartbeat ↔ InsightsMetrics correlation), which works even when Azure Resource Graph doesn't expose `osProfile.computerName`.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OS = any(OSType) by Computer
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(5m), '✅ Up', '🔴 Down')
| extend MinAgo = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen)
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, Status, OS, LastSeen, MinAgo
| order by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Host Up / Down Status — Filtered by Tag (OS hostname)

content.json:
### 📋 Alert Thresholds & Legend
Adjust thresholds using the pills above. Empty alert table = healthy fleet.

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize AvgVal = round(avg(Val), 1) by DisplayComputer
| where AvgVal > toint('{CpuThreshold}')
| extend Computer = DisplayComputer, Alert = strcat('🔴 CPU > {CpuThreshold}% (', AvgVal, '%)'), Metric = 'CPU';
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgVal = round(avg(UsedPct), 1) by DisplayComputer
| where AvgVal > toint('{MemThreshold}')
| extend Computer = DisplayComputer, Alert = strcat('🟠 Mem > {MemThreshold}% (', AvgVal, '%)'), Metric = 'Memory';
let DISK = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize MinFree = round(min(Val), 1) by DisplayComputer, Disk
| where MinFree < toint('{DiskThreshold}')
| summarize CriticalMounts = strcat_array(make_list(strcat(Disk, ' (', tostring(MinFree), '%)')), ', ') by DisplayComputer
| extend Computer = DisplayComputer, Alert = strcat('🟡 Disk < {DiskThreshold}% free — ', CriticalMounts), Metric = 'Disk';
union CPU, MEM, DISK
| project Computer, Metric, Alert
| order by Computer asc, Metric asc
content.title: Active Threshold Alerts — last 15 min (OS hostname, Filtered by Tag)

content.json:
## 💻 Performance & Availability
Fleet heartbeat status with CPU, Memory, Disk metrics. **Hostnames normalized** to OS name across all panels.

> 🏷️ **Tag Filter active**.
> 👆 **Click any VM row** to drill into its metrics.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OS = any(OSType), Heartbeats = count() by Computer
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(5m), '✅ Online', '🔴 Offline')
| extend MinAgo = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen)
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, NormalizedComputer, Status, OS, LastSeen, MinAgo, Heartbeats
| order by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Fleet Availability (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.json:
### 📌 Filtered to: **{DrillVM}**
*Click a VM row above to filter all charts.*

---

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}' or NormalizedComputer =~ '{DrillVM}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), DisplayComputer
| project TimeGenerated, Computer = DisplayComputer, AvgCPU
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: CPU Utilization % (OS hostname)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}' or NormalizedComputer =~ '{DrillVM}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgMemPct = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), DisplayComputer
| project TimeGenerated, Computer = DisplayComputer, AvgMemPct
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: Memory Used % (OS hostname)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}' or NormalizedComputer =~ '{DrillVM}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), DisplayComputer, Disk
| where isnotnull(Value)
| extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — ', Disk)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Disk Free % (OS hostname)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}' or NormalizedComputer =~ '{DrillVM}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2), MaxCPU = round(max(Val), 2), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by DisplayComputer
| extend CPUAlert = iff(P95CPU > 85, '🔴 High', iff(P95CPU > 60, '🟡 Medium', '🟢 Normal'))
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, AvgCPU, MaxCPU, P95CPU, CPUAlert
| order by P95CPU desc
content.title: CPU Summary — Avg / Max / P95 (OS hostname)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}' or NormalizedComputer =~ '{DrillVM}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize CurrentFree = round(avg(Val), 1), MinFree = round(min(Val), 1), MaxFree = round(max(Val), 1) by DisplayComputer, Disk
| extend DiskStatus = iff(CurrentFree < 10, '🔴 Critical', iff(CurrentFree < 20, '🟡 Warning', '🟢 OK'))
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, Disk, CurrentFree, MinFree, MaxFree, DiskStatus
| order by Computer asc, CurrentFree asc
content.title: Disk Free % — All Mount Points (OS hostname)

content.json:
## 🖥 Services — Inventory & Changes
Windows service inventory and change history (requires the **ChangeTracking** solution). Hostnames normalized to OS hostname.

> 🏷️ **Tag Filter active**.
> 👆 **Click any row** to filter change history to that service.

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize SvcState = take_any(SvcState), SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType) by Computer, SvcName
| summarize
    Running       = countif(SvcState == 'Running'),
    Stopped       = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'),
    Disabled      = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled'),
    Unknown       = countif(not(SvcState in ('Running','Stopped'))),
    TotalVMs      = dcount(Computer),
    TotalServices = count()
| project TotalServices, TotalVMs, Running, Stopped, Disabled, Unknown
content.title: Service State Summary — Filtered by Tag

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize
    LastSeen       = max(TimeGenerated),
    SvcDisplayName = take_any(SvcDisplayName),
    SvcState       = take_any(SvcState),
    SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType),
    SvcAccount     = take_any(SvcAccount),
    DisplayComputer = take_any(DisplayComputer)
  by Computer, SvcName
| extend StateIcon = case(
    SvcState == 'Running',                              '✅ Running',
    SvcState == 'Stopped' and SvcStartupType == 'Auto', '🔴 Stopped (Auto-start!)',
    SvcState == 'Stopped',                              '🟠 Stopped',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled',                       '⬛ Disabled',
                                                       '🟡 Unknown')
| extend StartupIcon = case(
    SvcStartupType == 'Auto',     '🟢 Auto',
    SvcStartupType == 'Manual',   '🔵 Manual',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled', '⬛ Disabled',
                                   '❓ Unknown')
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, DisplayName = SvcDisplayName, ServiceKey = SvcName, StateIcon, StartupIcon, ServiceAccount = SvcAccount, LastUpdated = LastSeen
| order by Computer asc, DisplayName asc
content.title: Service Inventory (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag 🔍 Click a row to see its change history

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| where isempty('{SelectedService}') or SvcName =~ '{SelectedService}'
| where isempty('{ServiceComputer}')  or Computer =~ '{ServiceComputer}' or DisplayComputer =~ '{ServiceComputer}'
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer = DisplayComputer, DisplayName = SvcDisplayName, ServiceKey = SvcName, ChangeIcon, PreviousState = Previous, CurrentState = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Change History — {SelectedService}

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize SvcState = take_any(SvcState), SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType), DisplayComputer = take_any(DisplayComputer) by Computer, SvcName
| summarize Total = count(), Running = countif(SvcState == 'Running'), Stopped = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'), Disabled = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled'), DisplayComputer = take_any(DisplayComputer) by Computer
| extend StoppedPct = round(todouble(Stopped) / Total * 100, 1)
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, Total, Running, Stopped, Disabled, StoppedPct
| order by Stopped desc, Computer asc
content.title: Services by Computer (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer = DisplayComputer, DisplayName = SvcDisplayName, ServiceKey = SvcName, ChangeIcon, PreviousState = Previous, CurrentState = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: All Recent Service Changes (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.json:
## 📈 Capacity Planning
Disk trends, CPU/Memory P95 baselines, and rightsizing analysis. Hostnames normalized to OS hostname.

> 🏷️ **Tag Filter active**.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DisplayComputer, Disk
| where isnotnull(Value)
| extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — ', Disk)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Disk Free % Trend (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.query:
let BASE = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct);
let AVG = BASE | summarize Value = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DisplayComputer | extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — Avg');
let P95 = BASE | summarize Value = round(percentile(UsedPct, 95), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DisplayComputer | extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — P95');
union AVG, P95
| where isnotnull(Value)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Memory Used % — Avg & P95 (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.query:
let AVG = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DisplayComputer
| extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — Avg');
let P95 = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize Value = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DisplayComputer
| extend Series = strcat(DisplayComputer, ' — P95');
union AVG, P95
| where isnotnull(Value)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: CPU Utilization % — Avg & P95 (OS hostname) — Filtered by Tag

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val),1), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val,95),1), MaxCPU = round(max(Val),1) by DisplayComputer;
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| extend DisplayComputer = coalesce(tostring(todynamic('{HostMap}')[NormalizedComputer]), Computer)
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{TagKey}') or "{TagValue}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({TaggedComputers})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgMem = round(avg(UsedPct),1), P95Mem = round(percentile(UsedPct,95),1), MaxMem = round(max(UsedPct),1) by DisplayComputer;
CPU
| join kind=leftouter MEM on DisplayComputer
| extend CPUSizing = case(P95CPU > toint('{CpuHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded', P95CPU < toint('{CpuLowThreshold}'), '🔵 Underutilized', '🟢 Right-sized')
| extend MemSizing = case(P95Mem > toint('{MemHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded', P95Mem < toint('{MemLowThreshold}'), '🔵 Underutilized', '🟢 Right-sized')
| project Computer = DisplayComputer, AvgCPU, P95CPU, MaxCPU, CPUSizing, AvgMem, P95Mem, MaxMem, MemSizing
| order by P95CPU desc
content.title: CPU & Memory Sizing Summary — P95 Baseline (OS hostname, Filtered by Tag)
